data: {"generalSituation":"A southerly airstream will continue to bring hot weather to the coast of Guangdong tomorrow, showers triggered by high temperatures will also affect the region. A trough of low pressure will form over central China, and edge closer to the coast of southern China gradually. Meanwhile, under the influence of upper-air disturbances, there will be heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over the coastal areas on Thursday and Friday. The trough of low pressure is expected to linger over the northern part of the South China Sea during the weekend. A fresh to strong easterly airstream will affect Guangdong. There will still be showers over the region. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Hagupit will linger over the seas east of the Philippines in the next couple of days.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260513","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods. Hot during the day.
